name: Code Review
description: Iterative 5-stage code review. Context → Bugs → Security → Style/Tests → Summarize, with a quality gatekeeper that loops until all CRITICAL and HIGH findings are resolved or acknowledged. Paste a diff or attach files.

inputs.label: Code (diff, file paths, or pasted source)
What's this change trying to do?

gatekeeper.pass_criteria: Every finding marked CRITICAL or HIGH must be (a) addressed by a suggested patch in the latest summary, OR (b) explicitly marked ACKNOWLEDGED with a justification by the summarizer. MEDIUM and LOW findings may remain open but must be listed. If any CRITICAL/HIGH is still BLOCKED (no patch, no acknowledgement), pass=false.
gatekeeper.label: Judge
